MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The verified application of Casey Martens to appear pro hac vice as counsel to plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

The verified application of Molly Hamilton Cawley to appear pro hac vice as counsel to plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.
